basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Jr. Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 17 April 2026 on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Jr. Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: 1st class B.Tech in Civil Engineering and 1st class M.Tech in Geotechnical Engineering. Experience in conducting laboratory and model-scale experiments, specifically focusing on the application of acoustic emissions in geotechnical engineering for early prediction of failures. NET/GATE qualified (relaxable for candidates from CFTIs with CGPA >8.000).

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IIT Delhi recruitment is Jr. Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Jr. Research Fellow post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Jr. Research Fellow position is Rs.37,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Jr. Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a 1st class B.Tech in Civil Engineering and 1st class M.Tech in Geotechnical Engineering, along with relevant experience and NET/GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 15 May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project duration mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The project duration is up to 10 March 2027.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the IIT Delhi office in New Delhi.
